ws.historySearchNeedGrepOrPickaxe: Enter a subject filter (--grep) or pickaxe (-S) text.
ws.historyLimitApprox: Current load limit is about {n} commits.
ws.stashPatchConfirm:
The following will run in the terminal: {cmd}

(Interactive hunk selection; complements patch staging.)
ws.partialStageConfirm:
The following will run in the terminal: {cmd}

(Interactive hunk selection.)
ws.remoteUrlMissing: No URL for this remote. Configure remotes in the sidebar first.
ws.needBranchForCompare: Check out a local branch (not detached HEAD) to open the compare page.
ws.hostingUnknownRemote: This remote is not a common GitHub / GitLab / Bitbucket URL. Open the host manually to create a PR.
ws.removeRemoteConfirm: Remove remote “{name}”? The local repo will no longer reference it.
ws.stashPopConfirm: Pop stash #{n}? It will be removed from the stack after applying.
ws.stashDropConfirm:
Drop stash {n}?{hint}
This cannot be undone (same as git stash drop).
ws.rebaseConfirm:
Rebase current branch onto “{ref}”?
(same as git rebase {ref})
Uncommitted changes may block the operation; resolve conflicts if needed.
ws.cherryPickConfirm: Cherry-pick commit {short} onto the current branch?
ws.revertMergePrompt: This is a merge commit. Enter the mainline parent number (usually 1 for the first parent).
ws.revertConfirm: Create a new commit reverting changes from “{short}” (git revert --no-edit).
ws.resetHintSoft: Moves HEAD only; index and working tree stay.
ws.resetHintMixed: Moves HEAD and unstages; working tree files kept.
ws.resetHintHard: Moves HEAD and matches index/working tree to that commit (loses uncommitted work).
ws.resetHardAgain: Again: hard reset cannot be undone. Unsaved local changes will be lost.
ws.rebaseTodoMissing:
No rebase todo to edit (no rebase-merge/git-rebase-todo).

To start an interactive rebase, run git rebase -i … in a terminal (needs an external editor). Example: rebase last 3 commits — git rebase -i HEAD~3

Open a terminal in the repo root?
ws.mergeAbortConfirm: Abort merge? The repo returns to the state before the merge started.
ws.rebaseSkipConfirm: Skip the current commit and continue rebase? (That commit’s changes will be dropped.)
ws.rebaseAbortConfirm: Abort rebase and return to the state before it started?
ws.tagDeletedRemoteToo: Local tag deleted and removed from remote
ws.submoduleRemoveConfirm:
Remove submodule “{name}”?
Runs git submodule deinit and git rm (resolve uncommitted work first).
ws.submoduleUpdateConfirm: Run git submodule update --init --recursive to check out submodules to the commits recorded in the parent repo.
ws.submoduleUpdateRemoteConfirm: Run git submodule update --remote --{mode} --recursive (track remote branches per submodule).
ws.pushDeleteBranchConfirm: Run git push {remote} --delete {branch} to delete the remote branch.
ws.checkoutOursDone: Wrote our version to the working tree; review then stage
ws.checkoutTheirsDone: Wrote their version to the working tree; review then stage
ws.mergetoolLaunched: Merge tool requested (if nothing opens, check Settings or git mergetool config)
ws.clearWorkspaceConfirm: Clears saved tab list and in-session UI state and closes the current repo. Theme and Settings defaults are kept.

history.toolbarHint: All branches in one graph (git log --all, not truncated). Click a row to select; details are in the tabs below.
history.perfHint: For large repos only the latest {n} commits load by default; adjust in Settings or load more below.
history.pickFileLeft: Select a file on the left
history.selectCommitInGraph: Select a commit in the graph
history.snapshotTreeEmpty: No files in this commit tree (or still loading)

graph.rebaseCurrentHere: Rebase current branch onto this commit
graph.resetSoft: Soft reset HEAD to this commit
graph.resetMixed: Mixed reset HEAD to this commit
graph.resetHard: Hard reset HEAD to this commit

welcome.emptyDesc: Open a local Git repository to get started
welcome.tip: Layout inspired by Fork: menu and ribbon, branch tree, commit list, and commit details.

banner.conflictHint: {n} conflicted file(s). Resolve then use Continue to finish.
banner.bisectHint: Mark good/bad on the current checkout, skip, or reset.

hunk.noHunks: No splittable hunks (binary or no @@ hunks).

tagDelete.title: Delete tag
tagDelete.alsoRemote: Also delete the tag on the remote (git push <remote> --delete refs/tags/…)
tagDelete.noRemoteHint: No remotes configured; cannot delete from remote.
